cart.title: Tawb Yuav
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: Tsis nrhiav tau nqi tsis tau them.
cart.thankYouForOrder: Ua tsaug rau koj kev xaj.
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Thov ntxiv chaw nyob them nqi kom txuas ntxiv koj qhov kev yuav.
cart.addCardPrompt: Txhawm rau ntxiv credit card, thov nyem rau Ntxiv Daim Npav Tshiab.
cart.autoChargeCc: Them Credit Card Tsis Tu Ncua
cart.balanceInvoiceInfo: Cov Nyiaj thiab Cov Nqi Them
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Thov them nqi rau kev qhib kev pab cuam. Thaum tau txais nyiaj, kev pab cuam yuav qhib tam sim ntawd.
cart.manualBankPayment: Txoj Kev Them Nyiaj Rau Txhab Nyiaj Tes:
cart.bankPaymentNote: Tom qab them nyiaj, qhib ib daim ntawv thov kev pab nrog tus ID kev pauv nyiaj, hnub, thiab tus nqi them. Peb yuav credit nyiaj tes.

creditCard.deleteConfirm: Koj pom zoo rho koj daim npav credit {card}?
creditCard.name: Lub Npe
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Kev txheeb xyuas xav tau ua ntej koj lub credit card muaj siv tau. InterServer yuav them koj lub credit card nrog ob tus nqi hauv qab $1.00.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: Cov kev them no yuav tshwm rau ntawm koj daim ntawv qhia nyiaj hauv ob peb feeb, feem ntau hauv qab cov kev pauv nyiaj tos ntsoov.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: Cov kev them tso cai no tsuas yog rau kev txheeb xyuas xwb thiab yuav raug tshem tawm hauv 3-5 hnub.
creditCard.securityCode: Tus Lej Ruaj Ntseg Ntawm Daim Npav (CVV / CSV)
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: Kuv txais ob qhov kev them ib ntus hauv qab $1.00.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Nkag mus rau koj lub credit card hauv internet los yog hu koj lub txhab nyiaj los txheeb xyuas ob tus nqi them.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Thov ntaus ob tus nqi them rau koj lub credit card. Cov nqi yuav tsum ua USD.
creditCard.completeAuthorization: Ua Kom Tiav Kev Tso Cai
creditCard.currencyNote: Thov nco ntsoov tias cov kev them rau koj daim ntawv qhia nyiaj credit card yuav nyob hauv lwm lub nqi nyiaj.
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Daim npav no tau txheeb xyuas thiab qhib rau kev siv hauv peb lub system.
creditCard.notVerifiedTooltip: Txheeb xyuas credit card ua ntej
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Nyem ntawm no los qhib credit card no rau kev siv.

paymentSuccess.title: Them Nqi Ua Tau
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Ua tsaug rau koj kev them nqi. Koj kev yuav tau tiav ua tiav.

prepays.title: Nyiaj Them Ua Ntej

prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Siv tsis tu ncua rau cov nqi them tshiab
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Koj puas xav rho tawm koj prepay #{id} thiab nws keeb kwm?

pay.returnedFromPayment: Rov los ntawm kev them nqi.

paymentTypes.title: Hom Kev Them Nqi
paymentTypes.ccNote: Txhua daim credit card yuav tsum txheeb xyuas ua ntej siv tau. Los txheeb xyuas, nyem rau "Txheeb Xyuas".
